reasoning: The base rate of a team like Crystal Palace winning the Premier League is less than 1%. Under manager Oliver Glasner, they have improved into a competitive side (even winning the FA Cup in May 2025), but they remain well short of being title contenders. Pre-season predictions placed them in the mid-table (9th to 14th). Early 2025-26 season results showed them making a decent start (4th place after 5 games), but they were already 6 points behind league leaders Liverpool by late September. As of November 2025, there is absolutely no indication that Palace is mounting a historic, Leicester-style title challenge. With no evidence to justify deviating from the extremely low base rate, the probability is set to the system minimum of 0.02.
